landing.title: Cosmic Aura & Vibe Check
landing.subtitle: Discover your cosmic signature, rarity tier, and find out who matches your vibe.

q1.text: When you enter a room full of strangers...

q4.text: In a group project, you are...

q6.text: Your friends would describe you as...

q7.text: When faced with a sudden problem...

red.name: Supernova Red
red.meme: Major Main Character Syndrome, literally runs the simulation.

orange.name: Cosmic Orange
orange.meme: Absolute chaos bringer, but makes it look aesthetic.

gold.name: Solar Flare Gold
gold.meme: The designated 'Golden Retriever' friend with zero brain cells but 100% vibes.

green.name: Aurora Green
green.meme: Mother nature's favorite. Probably talks to plants.

teal.name: Comet Teal
teal.meme: Always side-questing. Can't text back but will mail you a rock.

blue.name: Nebula Blue
blue.meme: The Silent Observer. Knows all the tea, says nothing.

purple.name: Quasar Purple
purple.meme: Mysterious, majestic, and probably needs more sleep.

black.name: Event Horizon Black
black.meme: Secretly toxic Villain Energy, but people love it.

crimson.name: Blazing Crimson
crimson.meme: Living life at 200mph. Here for a good time, not a long time.

white.name: White Dwarf
white.meme: Dense, organized, and the only reason the group chat survives.

pink.name: Pulsar Pink
pink.meme: Chaotic genius. Will debate you at 3 AM about nothing.

magenta.name: Lunar Magenta
magenta.meme: The mom friend with mystical vibes. Probably owns tarot cards.

cyan.name: Rogue Cyan
cyan.meme: Unpredictable solo wanderer. Knows how to pick a lock.

silver.name: Iron Silver
silver.meme: Cold, calculated, and has a spreadsheet for everything.

yellow.name: Stardust Yellow
yellow.meme: Floating through life purely on aesthetics and good tunes.

indigo.name: Solar Indigo
indigo.meme: Rare, deeply emotional, and sees right through your soul.
